name: altdns
title: altdns
summary: Subdomain discovery through alterations and permutations
description:
Subdomain discovery through alterations and permutations
This package contains a DNS recon tool that allows for the discovery of
subdomains that conform to patterns. Altdns takes in words that could be
present in subdomains under a domain (such as test, dev, staging) as well
as takes in a list of subdomains that you know of.
.
From these two lists that are provided as input to altdns, the tool then
generates a massive output of "altered" or "mutated" potential subdomains
that could be present. It saves this output so that it can then be used by
your favourite DNS bruteforcing tool.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use altdns because Subdomain discovery through alterations and permutations.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use altdns as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `altdns [POSITION] [argument]` as documented upstream for altdns.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `altdns -i subdomains.txt -o data_output -w words.txt -r -s results_output.txt` as documented upstream for altdns.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair altdns with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `altdns --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
